overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a continuous walk through a futuristic urban plaza. The scene features towering glass skyscrapers, holographic billboards, elevated highways, and tropical palm landscaping under bright midday sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway beneath elevated highway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered pedestrian path beneath the elevated monorail structure

entered.detail: elevated monorail or highway structure with support columns and signage
large purple billboard advertising Set Sail beverage with holographic display
tall palm trees in concrete planters lining the walkway

segments.scene_description: Walking beneath an elevated highway structure in a futuristic city, with a large purple holographic billboard dominating the right side. Palm trees line the left side of the concrete walkway as the camera moves forward through this semi-covered urban corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: pedestrian seating area with retaining walls and benches

events.description: emerges from shadow of overpass into bright direct sunlight

agents.ego_description: walking past concrete benches where NPCs are seated and socializing

notable_agents.action: seated on bench playing a stringed instrument while another NPC listens

entered.detail: metal and concrete benches occupied by seated pedestrians
tall concrete wall with greenery planted on top

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered walkway into direct sunlight, the scene reveals a seating area with NPCs resting on benches along a concrete retaining wall. The elevated highway falls behind as the camera passes a musician playing on a bench.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with food kiosk and large palm planters

events.description: enters open plaza area with food vendors and tropical landscaping

agents.ego_description: walking through the open plaza observing the food kiosk and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: standing near yellow food kiosk browsing available items

entered.detail: small yellow and green food vendor stall with awning
large rectangular planters containing mature palm trees
tall building facade with large digital advertisements and holographic displays

segments.scene_description: Transitioning into a spacious open plaza with large palm planters and a yellow food kiosk on the left. The area features tiled paving and holographic advertisements on distant skyscrapers as pedestrians stroll through the sunlit space.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial plaza with pharmaceutical storefronts and dense landscaping

agents.ego_description: continuing through the plaza past seated individuals and commercial storefronts

entered.detail: building with visible 'Pharmaceuticals' signage and green neon accents
bright digital advertisement screens on building facades
tall glass and steel skyscrapers with corporate branding

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the commercial plaza surrounded by dense tropical plantings in large planters. The camera passes by a pharmaceutical storefront with neon signage while pedestrians occupy benches along the walkway, with towering glass skyscrapers visible in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a shaded urban corridor into a sprawling, sun-drenched commercial plaza. It begins beneath the heavy concrete of an elevated highway, moving past palm trees and a dominant purple holographic billboard. As the camera exits the covered walkway into direct sunlight, the environment opens up to reveal a seating area where NPCs rest on benches and a musician performs. The scene then expands into a spacious open plaza characterized by tiled paving, a yellow food kiosk, and distant holographic advertisements on towering skyscrapers. Finally, the camera moves deeper into the commercial hub, passing through dense tropical plantings and neon pharmaceutical signage while pedestrians linger beneath the glass heights of the city.
